stemHtml: Which statement about rudder pedal nose wheel steering of a jet transport aeroplane is correct?

options.a: When performing a rudder check during taxiing there is no need for additional pilot action to avoid deflection of the nose wheel.
options.b: Rudder pedal nose wheel steering only functions during take-off roll.
options.c: Rudder pedal nose wheel steering functions on the ground as well as in the air.
options.d: Manual or tiller nose wheel steering offers a larger maximum deflection of the nose wheel compared to rudder pedal nose wheel steering.
